text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Ch. is today, and there's a big
commotion in the Kyoto Racecourse paddock.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aaand... hup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Impressive, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's going on over here?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono just picked up a barbell like it was
a toothpick. The thing had to be as heavy as a
piano...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: You can't be serious?! Are Umamusume that strong?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
No, she's an outlier even among Umamusume!
They can't all lift weights like they weigh nothing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I bulked up lots just for today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I heard Taiki's gotten waaay stronger, so I had to
do my best to match her strength!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna lose, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run against Taiki with all my power and
in my own style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's unwavering determination
catches the attention of the chatty crowd, and
they all fall to a hush as they listen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, they start cheering loudly for her!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text: Go for it, Bono!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! Make today the biggest and best
race ever!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna put out my 110% today! I'll make sure
you all feel happy and full after watching me run
today, so stay excited!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What an amazin' crowd!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I got trained up real good for today! I practically
ran the soles off my cleats to prep for this race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I won't be beat!

text_block_list.name: Taiki's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Show us what you've got, Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I'm countin' on y'all to cheer for me with
fire in your hearts!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, both sides are electric!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Ch. is here. The curtains on the big stage
are finally rising!
